targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, station_name, metric, ROUND(value::numeric, 2) AS value, warning
FROM measurements
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND ('${station}' = '__all__' OR station_name = '${station}')
  AND ('${metric}' = '__all__' OR metric = '${metric}')
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.definition: SELECT '__all__' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT station_name AS __value, station_name AS __text FROM stations ORDER BY 2
list.label: Station
list.name: station
list.query: SELECT '__all__' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT station_name AS __value, station_name AS __text FROM stations ORDER BY 2

list.definition: SELECT '__all__' AS __value, 'All Metrics' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT metric AS __value, metric AS __text FROM measurements ORDER BY 2
list.label: Metric
list.name: metric
list.query: SELECT '__all__' AS __value, 'All Metrics' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT metric AS __value, metric AS __text FROM measurements ORDER BY 2
